mechanism: The Kalecki channel creates fiscal dependency: current earnings embed $20-40/share from deficits. Fiscal consolidation mechanically removes this support, reducing EPS by $10-20/share (4-8%) under moderate scenarios or 15-20% under aggressive consolidation (deficit from 6.5% to 3-4% GDP).
regime_dependence: Risk is proportional to current deficit level and speed of consolidation. Currently at peak exposure with deficit at ~6-7% GDP. Godley sectoral balance framework projects private sector forced from surplus to deficit under consolidation.
